name: Charlés
description:
Charlés is an Exceed with the same type of magic as Happy.  Wendy found her as an egg and they have been together ever since. They are very close, and Charlés sees it as her duty to protect Wendy from danger.

Charlés is strict and uptight. She disapproves of fooling around.

~!Charlés, like all Exceeds, came from the parallel world Edolas. She is the Exceed's princess, daughter of Queen Shagotte. As such, she possesses the same power as her mother: precognition.!~  

~!After a year of training, she learns and perfects the ability to use Transformation Magic, making her appear as a young girl around Wendy's age. In this form, Charlés's magic and precognition abilities are increased, as well as her overall hand-to-hand combat proficiency.!~
